metadata.description: A collection of tmux productivity plugins for Claude Code.

plugins.name: nvim-sidebar
plugins.description: Auto-opens NeoVim in a tmux split pane as a sidebar when Claude Code edits files. Keeps nvim synced in real-time with all changes.

plugins.name: rename-window
plugins.description: Renames the tmux window to the current project folder name in PascalCase on session start.
